headline: Taylor Farms, Sysco Remove Mexico Iceberg Lettuce After FDA Traces Massive Cyclospora Outbreak to Taco Bell Supply Chain
summary: Taylor Farms and Sysco pulled Mexico-sourced iceberg lettuce after the FDA linked it to a Taco Bell Cyclospora outbreak.
